asr_es: Tomamos nota de su observación y procuraremos arreglar cualquier problema material que dificulte el buen funcionamiento de esta Cámara. Bien, decía que el virus que nos ha impedido votar esta mañana ha sido detenido y vamos a poder intentarlo otra vez. Gracias. La señora Hatimaki, espero no pronunciarlo demasiado mal, y presentada por 46 diputados, la señora Luling. Los candidatos me han comunicado, ya lo habían comunicado esta mañana, que aceptaban su candidatura, pero ya los hemos conocido, además, físicamente, porque se han dado a conocer esta mañana. Y, puesto que seguimos teniendo más candidatos... ...que puestos por cubrir, hay que votar de acuerdo con el reglamento en votación secreta y lo haremos de acuerdo con las normas aplicables a la elección de los vicepresidentes por el procedimiento electrónico. Bien, el procedimiento electrónico requiere alguna explicación. Los diputados y diputadas que lo han sido en anteriores legislaturas lo conocen perfectamente. Pero los nuevos... ...y somos muchos, probablemente no estén acostumbrados con el sistema de voto. ¿Puedo preguntarles si desean que hagamos una prueba, una simulación, para estar seguros de que sabemos utilizarlo? ¿Sí? De acuerdo. Entonces, permítanme que me convierta en... Es que no se puede hacer directamente lo que... ...de la mente que está ahí. No, es que no. Vamos a hacer, pues, una prueba. Vamos a hacer... ...una prueba. Una simulación. Permítanme que me convierta en improvisado... ...improvisado... ...instructor de manejo del sistema de voto.
hypothesis_en: We take note of your observation and we will try to fix any material problem that hinders the proper functioning of this House. Well, I said that the virus that has prevented us from voting this morning has been stopped and we will be able to try again. Thank you. Mrs. Hatimaki, I hope I don't pronounce it too badly, and presented by 46 deputies, Mrs. Luling. The candidates have informed me, they had already informed me this morning, that they accept their candidacy, but we have already met them, moreover, physically, because they have made themselves known this morning. And, since we still have more candidates... ...which positions to cover, we have to vote according to the regulation in secret ballot and we will do it according to the rules applicable to the election of vice presidents by the electronic procedure. Well, the electronic procedure requires some explanation. The deputies have become familiar with what happened in previous legislatures. But the new ones are perfectly familiar with it. ...But I hope I don't pronounce it too badly, and presented by 46 deputies, Mrs. Luling. The candidates have communicated to me, they had already communicated this morning, that they accept their candidacy, but we have also met them physically, because they have made themselves known this morning. And, since we still have more candidates to cover, we have to vote in secret ballot and we will do it according to the rules applicable to the election of vice presidents by the electronic procedure. Well, the electronic procedure requires some explanation.
reference_en: we have taken note of those comments and we shall try to remedy the technical problems that are preventing the House from functioning properly (2.81) so we had a bit of a bug this morning that prevented us and they've managed to catch the bug and we are going to try and vote again now (1.92) (1.48) let me once again (2.2) read out this item the election you have the same candidates I read them out this morning but I shall repeat them nonetheless so that we are properly respecting the procedure for the EPP James Nicholson and Mrs Quisthoudt-Rowohl for the Socialists Mrs De Vits and Mrs Grabowska for the ALDE group Mrs Jäätteenmaki (2.59) I hope that my pronunciation isn't massacring it too badly and then presented by forty-six Members Mrs Astrid Lulling the candidates have informed me as they did this morning that they accept their nomination (4.34) a= and we we saw them physically this morning they stood up (1.41) we still have more candidates than there are posts or quaestorships so we have to have a secret ballot in accordance with the rules using (1.85) the procedures applicable to the election of the vice-presidents using our electronic voting system (2.54) there are some explanations required I mean there are Members who were here in the last parliamentary term who'll be familiar with this system but new Members and there are many of us are probably not so familiar with this voting system (2.3) (1.07) would you like us to carry out a check a= a= a test to see whether we can use the system or not yes yes okay we'll do that (1.14) (3.81) ((Chairman starts speaking)) vamos hacer pues una prueba ((Chairman stops speaking)) so we'll carry out a test (1.7) a a simulation (7.18) let me become a a driving instructor if you like for this (1.13) for this electronic voting system
